# CHANNEL_ATLAS

**Generated by `tools/channel-atlas.js`. Do not hand-edit.**

Auto-derived from every block's `manifest.emits` / `manifest.consumes` /
`manifest.undoable` declaration. Channels appear once each, with the full set
of blocks that emit, consume, or hold them undoable. Orphans (channels emitted
but never consumed, or vice versa) are listed at the bottom under "Unmatched".

Static analysis only — channels constructed dynamically (computed strings) are
invisible. Cross-reference with `tests/block-contract-tests.js` Rule C, which
enforces the manifest-vs-emit-call invariant. Cross-reference with
`docs/LANDMINES.md` #3 for the handshake protocol that makes channels work.

**Stats:** 80 channels across 49 blocks.

---

## Unmatched

Channels declared in only one direction. May be intentional (kernel-handled
channels like `nexus.launch`, channels not yet wired up to a consumer, or
channels emitted by external sources). Worth a glance during sweeps.
